## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:` — patch bump)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:` — minor bump)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` / `fix!:` — major bump)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Chore / maintenance (`chore:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally — `deno task test`
- [ ] Lint passes — `deno task lint`
- [ ] Format check passes — `deno task fmt:check`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/):
      `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `perf:`

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #<issue number> -->
